no_claim_reason: Same-server timing is measured directly on one host and the artifact emits checker/waveform Spectre-equivalence gates. Paper-facing speed claims should use only equivalence-gated rows and still need repeated cold/warm runs.
evas_only_no_claim_reason: EVAS-only speed experiments are candidate evidence; paper-facing speed claims require same-slice EVAS/Spectre timing.

policy.relative_rms_gate: row_mean_relative_rms_error<=0.10 and worst_signal_relative_rms_error<=0.22; or row_mean_relative_rms_error<=0.08 and worst_signal_relative_rms_error<=0.25
